mapper.select: SELECT banner_id, title, image_url, link_url, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time FROM banner WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO banner (title, image_url, link_url, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE banner
title = #{title},
image_url = #{imageUrl},
link_url = #{linkUrl},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE banner_id = #{bannerId}
